Metadata.title: FIX Space · Conscious Trader's Workspace
Metadata.description: Trading journal, session routines, mistakes log, and strategy rules — seven pre-configured databases, broker import, and analytics, ready from day one.

HomePage.title: One workspace. Built for conscious traders.
HomePage.description: Stop switching between five apps. FIX Space centralizes your trading journal, session routines, mistakes log, and strategy rules — nine pre-configured databases, broker import, and analytics, ready from day one.

hero.title: FIX Space
hero.subtitle: Your entire trading experience in one environment.
hero.description: Trade parameters, notes, statistics, and mistakes are scattered across different places. We united them into a single ecosystem for deep analysis and growth.

fragmentation.title: Information Fragmentation
fragmentation.description: Crucial data is distributed across multiple disconnected environments. This directly impacts trading performance.

focus.title: Loss of Concentration
focus.description: Using multiple apps creates cognitive load right when you need to make fast decisions.

analysis.title: Complicated Analysis
analysis.description: Manually gathering information from several sources makes retrospective analysis incredibly tedious.

patterns.title: Hidden Patterns
patterns.description: Without relations between data points, it's nearly impossible to identify systematic rule deviations and cognitive biases.

approaches.title: Why current solutions fall short
approaches.description: No single approach provides data centralization, structural flexibility, and support for all aspects of a trader's activity simultaneously.

googleSheetsFeatures.manual: User takes full responsibility for all calculations.

notionFeatures.relations: Ability to build relations between records.
notionFeatures.centralization: High level of data centralization in one place.
notionFeatures.setup: Steep learning curve and complex initial setup.
notionFeatures.noAnalytics: No built-in trading metrics or analytics tools.

approaches.readyDataModel: Ready data model and analytics oriented around trading.
approaches.fixedStructure: Fixed structure — can't adapt the system to your workflow.

solution.title: A Unified Workspace
solution.description: FIX Space combines the flexibility of universal systems with the ready-made analytics of specialized journals.
solution.FIX SpaceDescription: Nine pre-configured databases ready on day one.
solution.advancedRelations: Database relations: link insights to specific trades or sessions.
solution.richMedia: 22 types of components: charts, screenshots, tables, and TradingView embeds.
solution.fullyCustomizable: Fully customizable — adapt the structure to your trading style.

instrumentTypes.subtitle: Key Data Types
instrumentTypes.description: Throughout the day, a trader accumulates various information. The system structures it by core areas.

trades.title: Trades
trades.description: The core of activity. Operation parameters, P&L, and commissions. The foundation for primary analysis.

dayAnalysis.title: Day Analysis
dayAnalysis.description: Trade context. Train of thought, emotions, and charts before/after. Building patterns.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: The qualitative component of experience. Free structure, technical aspects, and knowledge base.

mistakes.title: Mistakes
mistakes.description: Deviations from rules. Identifying behavioral patterns for targeted correction.

everythingTrader.title: 9 starting databases
everythingTrader.description: Nine databases with trade-aware properties, formula fields, and default templates — created automatically after registration.

tradingJournal.title: Trading Journal
tradingJournal.description: Log every trade with full context — instrument, direction, entry/exit, P&L, R:R, and setups. Broker imports supported.

dailyRoutine.title: Daily Routine
dailyRoutine.description: Structure your pre-session prep and post-session review. Build habits that compound into systemic performance.

performanceReview.title: Performance Review
performanceReview.description: Weekly, monthly, and quarterly retrospectives for deep analysis of your trading performance.

mistakes.title: Mistakes
mistakes.description: Track recurring behavioral errors and discipline breaks. Identify psychological patterns before they affect your capital.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Monitor balances, drawdowns, and leverage across all your broker accounts. A complete financial overview.

operations.title: Operations
operations.description: Transaction log: deposits, withdrawals, and internal transfers between accounts.

tradingSystem.title: Trading System
tradingSystem.description: Document your strategy rules, entry criteria, and risk parameters. Version and evaluate your edge.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Capture market observations, research, and insights in categorized records. Your personal library of edge.

routineLibrary.title: Routine Library
routineLibrary.description: A library of pre-built blocks and checklists for your routines. Create once, reuse everywhere.

neverBlankPage.title: Never start from a blank page
neverBlankPage.description: FIX Space ships with pre-built templates for trade logs, session reviews, and strategy documents. When creating a new record, a template is applied automatically — you get a ready-made page structure and can start filling it immediately. Build your own templates to match your personal workflow.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: From raw trade data to structured habits and measurable improvement — in three steps.

step1.title: Capture every detail
step1.description: Log trades manually or via broker import. Apply templates for session reviews, attach screenshots, and link records to specific setup rules.

step2.title: Analyze with precision
step2.description: Filter your journal by any custom property. Use formula fields and relations to identify which setups and market conditions drive your P&L.

step3.title: Compound your edge
step3.description: Follow systematic routines and track psychological errors. Refine your Trading System based on hard data rather than intuition.

automaticImport.title: Automatic import in seconds
automaticImport.description: Upload your export file and FIX Space maps the fields, validates the data, and populates your Trading Journal automatically — no manual entry needed.

cta.title: Turn your experience into capital.
cta.description: Stop losing edge to chaos. Start building your trading system on the foundation of FIX Space today. Free to start.

faq.title: Questions & Answers
faq.description: Everything you need to know about the platform and how it helps your trading.
faq.supportDescription: Our team is ready to help you with any technical or trading inquiry.

items.a: It's a simple, all-in-one place to keep track of your trades, thoughts, and progress. Instead of using multiple apps, you have one clean space for everything.

items.q: How is it better than simple spreadsheets?
items.a: Spreadsheets can get messy and hard to manage. FIX Space is built specifically for trading, so all the calculations and organization are done for you.

items.q: What if I have a unique trading style?
items.a: That's fine! You can easily add your own fields or change how your lists look to fit exactly how you trade. No technical skills required.

items.q: How exactly does the system help me find my mistakes?
items.a: It links every trade to specific rules and emotions. By looking at your history, the system shows which recurring errors (like FOMO) are costing you the most.

items.q: Is it possible to track my trading plan adherence?
items.a: Absolutely. You can add your entry criteria as a checklist. The system then calculates your 'discipline score' for each trade.

items.q: Can I manage multiple broker accounts in one place?
items.a: Yes. You can track balances and performance across different brokers and markets simultaneously in a single workspace.

items.q: Can I use this for both Crypto and Forex?
items.a: Yes. The platform handles various markets. You can log Bitcoin futures alongside Euro currency pairs, each with its own specific parameters.

items.q: Do I have to enter every trade manually?
items.a: No. You can automatically connect your exchange or broker, and your trades will show up in your journal. Manual CSV upload is also supported.
Yes. Your data is isolated at the workspace level and we use industry-standard security. Your results and notes are for your eyes only.

items.q: What happens if I stop using the platform?
items.a: You own your data. You can export everything at any time. If you delete your account, all your data is wiped from our servers immediately.
